title: Other Notices
description: In this year the Messenger of God sent al-'Ala' b. al-Iiadrami to alMundhir b. Sawa al= Abd1602 and wrote to him a letter containing the following: In the name of God, the Merciful and Compassionate. From Muhammad the Prophet, Messenger of God, to alMundhir b. Sawa: Peace be upon you! I praise to you God, save Whom there is no god. To proceed: I have received your letter and your messengers.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 08
